raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Unauthorized rebill on disputed charge without required documentation Barclays XXXX Rewards Visa Description of the problem : I am filing a complaint against Barclays regarding an improper rebill of a disputed transaction related to case number XXXX. 

On XX/XX/year>, Barclays sent me an official letter confirming that a provisional credit had been applied to my account for a disputed charge of {$1500.00}, from XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
The letter clearly states that : If we rebill your account, we will do so within 90 days and provide an explanation in writing along with copies of the relevant documentation. 

However, on XX/XX/year>, Barclays posted a RE-BILL for the same amount ( {$1500.00} ) on my account without providing any prior notice and without supplying any of the required merchant documentation, violating the terms stated in their own dispute letter. 

I received no written explanation, no evidence from the merchant, and no communication of any kind prior to the rebill. 
This violates : The banks own written dispute policy, Fair Credit Billing Act ( FCBA ) requirements for proper notice, My rights as a consumer during an active billing dispute.

I am requesting : 1. Immediate restoration of the provisional credit 2. Reopening of the dispute 3. Full copies of any documentation allegedly provided by the merchant 4. A written explanation for the rebill 5. Review of Barclays failure to follow dispute compliance procedures Barclays acted improperly by rebilling without notice, and I am seeking CFPB assistance to ensure the bank complies with FCBA regulations and restores my consumer protections. 

Account ending : XXXX Rebill posted on : XX/XX/year> Disputed amount : {$1500.00} Thank you for your assistance.
